title: TSO User Enumeration
description: Discover valid TSO userids through logon response analysis.

steps.title: Valid User Response
steps.screen:
TSO/E LOGON
Userid ===> HERC01
Password ===>

IKJ56425I INVALID PASSWORD
Enter password again.
steps.expected: Recognize that 'INVALID PASSWORD' confirms the userid exists.
steps.hint: Different error messages reveal valid vs invalid userids. This is user enumeration.
steps.assessment: Q1: Identity enumeration is possible before authentication.

steps.title: Invalid User Response
steps.screen:
TSO/E LOGON
Userid ===> NOTAUSER
Password ===>

IKJ56421I LOGON REJECTED - USERID NOTAUSER NOT DEFINED TO RACF
steps.expected: Note the different error message for non-existent users.
steps.hint: The system reveals whether a userid exists. This enables enumeration attacks.
steps.assessment: Q1: RACF tells you when a user doesn't exist - information disclosure.

steps.title: Locked Account
steps.screen:
TSO/E LOGON
Userid ===> LOCKED01
Password ===>

IKJ56428I USERID LOCKED01 HAS BEEN REVOKED
steps.hint: Revoked accounts still exist - they're just disabled. Different from non-existent.
steps.assessment: Q2: Authority is evaluated at logon time, not before.

steps.title: Enumeration Script Logic
steps.hint: Automated enumeration uses response patterns to classify userids.
steps.assessment: Q1: Identity enumeration through authentication interface.
